GRuModel(
  (linear1): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=16, bias=True)
  (encoder_linear): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=16, bias=True)
  (gru): GRU(16, 16, batch_first=True)
  (decoder_linear): Linear(in_features=16, out_features=4, bias=True)
  (linear2): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=4, bias=True)
)
